case_title: KULDEEP SINGH JOHAL VS. FOXCOVER TRUCKING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHAL, KULDEEP SINGH DBA JOHALBROS. ENTERPRISES AS TO DEFENDANT FOXCOVER TRUCKING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
